title: About
summary: Nanang Aditya - Software Engineer. Builds scalable enterprise systems using Laravel, Node.js (Express), Spring Boot, Docker.
text: Nanang Aditya is a Software Engineer focusing on building robust, scalable enterprise applications. Experienced with Laravel, Node.js (Express), Spring Boot, Docker, and CI/CD practices.

title: PT Jasa Marga - Fullstack Developer
summary: Worked on JM-RISE (toll road construction monitoring) and Aggregator Operasi (centralized master data).
text: At Jasa Marga, developed JM-RISE, a toll road construction monitoring system, and Aggregator Operasi, a centralized master data aggregator. Responsibilities included database design, API development, integrations, and CI/CD.

title: Skills
summary: Tech stack includes React, Vite, TailwindCSS, Laravel, Node.js, Docker, MySQL, Redis, GitLab CI/CD.
text: Frontend: React, Vite, TailwindCSS. Backend: Laravel, Node.js (Express). Databases: MySQL, Redis. DevOps: Docker, GitLab CI/CD. Other: experience with API design, system integration, and scalable architectures.

title: Selected Projects
summary: JM-RISE, Aggregator Operasi, JM-ACT — systems for monitoring, aggregation, and complaint management.
text: JM-RISE: toll road monitoring with real-time tracking and reporting. Aggregator Operasi: centralized master data API. JM-ACT: complaint management integrated with mobile apps, supporting RESTful APIs and notifications.
